results.title: nestjs-worker
results.description: A powerful NestJS library that provides seamless integration with Node.js worker_threads, enabling execution of CPU-intensive tasks in separate threads with a familiar NestJS service-based developer experience.

results.title: NestJS
results.description: NestJS 是一个渐进式 Node.js 框架，用于构建高效、可伸缩的服务器端应用程序，支持 TypeScript 并结合了面向对象编程、函数式编程和响应式编程的元素。

results.title: NestJS Plugins
results.description: NestJS Plugins is a collection of plugins for NestJS, including a NATS JetStream transport for efficient message queuing and communication.

results.title: NestJS
results.description: NestJS is a progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, reliable, and scalable server-side applications.

results.title: NestJS
results.description: NestJS is a progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, reliable, and scalable server-side applications.

results.title: NestJS
results.description: NestJS is a progressive Node.js framework for building efficient and scalable server-side applications, utilizing Angular CLI and Dgeni for documentation generation.

results.title: NestJS
results.description: A progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, scalable, and enterprise-grade server-side applications with TypeScript/JavaScript 🚀

results.title: NestJS i18n
results.description: The i18n module for nestjs.

results.title: NestJS CQRS
results.description: A lightweight CQRS module for the NestJS framework, enabling the implementation of Command Query Responsibility Segregation patterns in Node.js applications.

results.title: NestJS Enterprise Boilerplate
results.description: A production-ready NestJS boilerplate featuring JWT authentication, MongoDB integration, WebSocket support, Redis caching, and comprehensive security best practices.

results.title: Nestjs Soap
results.description: Nestjs Soap is a module that provides a wrapper for the 'soap' npm package, enabling seamless integration of SOAP clients within NestJS applications.

results.title: NestJS SQS
results.description: NestJS-SQS is a NestJS module that simplifies using AWS SQS with decorator-based message handling for easier integration and control of SQS flows.

results.title: NestJS CRUD
results.description: Nestjsx Crud is a microframework for building RESTful APIs with NestJs, offering easy-to-use, extendable CRUD controllers and services with advanced query parsing capabilities.

results.title: NestJS Shopify
results.description: A monorepo containing packages to develop Shopify applications using NestJS, including authentication, webhooks, and GraphQL API integration.

results.title: NestJS CLS
results.description: A NestJS module for continuation-local storage, enabling state propagation across asynchronous operations like callbacks and promise chains, useful for request tracking, user context, and more.

results.title: NestJS MCP Server
results.description: A modular NestJS library for building Model Context Protocol servers with decorators and integration patterns to expose resources, tools, and prompts in a scalable way.

results.title: NATS.js
results.description: NATS.js is the JavaScript client for NATS, offering native runtime support for Deno, Node/Bun, and browsers, with a modular design for core functionality, JetStream, KV, Object Store, and Services.

results.title: NestJS Level Up
results.description: A collection of modules and utilities to enhance NestJS applications, including features for common types, discovery, RabbitMQ, Hasura integration, GraphQL requests, webhooks, Stripe, and testing utilities.

results.title: NestJS MCP Adapter
results.description: A NestJS library for developing MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, supporting STDIO and HTTP protocols with full NestJS features like AuthGuard and Interceptors.

results.title: NestJS Cache Manager
results.description: NestJS Cache Manager is a module for NestJS that provides a drop-in replacement for the deprecated CacheModule, enabling efficient and scalable caching in server-side applications.

results.title: Necord
results.description: Necord is a module for creating Discord bots using NestJS, built on Discord.js, offering a fast and easy way to integrate Discord bot functionality into NestJS applications with support for custom decorators, slash commands, and NestJS features.

results.title: NestJS Drizzle
results.description: A NestJS module for integrating Drizzle ORM, providing support for various database drivers like PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite.

results.title: Event Nest
results.description: Event Nest provides a collection of NestJS libraries to simplify the implementation of event-sourcing architecture, managing events, aggregates, and domain subscriptions.

results.title: Mongest NestJS Service
results.description: A NestJS service that provides a type-safe wrapper for Mongoose, enhancing Mongoose methods with better argument typing, lean return typing, and discriminator-based polymorphism.

results.title: Nestjs Monorepo Boilerplate
results.description: A NestJS monorepo boilerplate project featuring a structured architecture, various services like logging, observability, and authentication, common design patterns, and integrated tools for local development, testing, and documentation.

results.title: NestJS Resend
results.description: A NestJS wrapper for Resend that supports sending single and batch emails with text, HTML, or React components.

results.title: NestJS Temporal Core
results.description: A NestJS integration for Temporal.io, enabling seamless workflow orchestration with auto-discovery, declarative scheduling, and production-ready features for building reliable distributed systems.

results.title: NestJS Prisma
results.description: NestJS Prisma provides easy Prisma support for your NestJS applications, enabling seamless integration with the Prisma ORM for database interactions.

results.title: NestJS Bull
results.description: NestJS Bull provides modules for integrating Bull and BullMQ, popular queueing libraries, into NestJS applications for efficient background job processing.

results.title: NestJS Throttler
results.description: NestJS Throttler is a rate-limiting module for NestJS applications, allowing developers to control the number of requests users can make to endpoints within a specified time frame.
